case_title: METAXAS, HARRY et al vs. SALIH, YAHYA et al

docket_entries.description: C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT IN DEPT. 514, CBEA, JUDGE; REDWARDS, CLERK; KGILLETT, CSR. PLNTF APPR BY AKONSTANTIN, ESQ AND DEF APPR BY JLASTOWSKI, ESQ WHO FAILED TO APPEAR AT TRIAL CALL IN THE DEPARTMENT OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE. DEF ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE DENIED. MATTER PROCEEDED AS DEFAULT HEARING. WIT SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE SUBMITTED. COURT AWARDS PLNTF HARRY METAXAS AND LOUISE METAXAS $25,000 RENT, $8200 ATTORNEY FEES AND $150 COSTS.
REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-20-2000 - PROCEEDED AS DEFAULT HEARING- GRANTED; SEE COURTS RULING.
